Variables.Name: Thickness
Variables.Description: The thickness of the scrollbar thumb

Functions.Name: SetState
Functions.Description:
Set the offset and size of the track's thumb.
	 Note that the maximum offset is 1.0-ThumbSizeFraction.
	 If the user can view 13 of the items in a single page, the maximum offset will be ~0.667f

Params.Name: InOffsetFraction
Params.Description: Offset of the thumbnail from the top as a fraction of the total available scroll space.

Params.Name: InThumbSizeFraction
Params.Description: Size of thumbnail as a fraction of the total available scroll space.
